meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve slow development speed (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome slow development speed. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Antigravity Project Template Checklist
content.seo_description: Overcome slow development speed with this student-focused checklist. Master the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to launch your first SaaS app.
content.answer_block: Slow development stems from configuration fatigue and boilerplate overhead. By leveraging the Antigravity project template, you eliminate setup friction, allowing you to focus on core logic. Combined with Claude Code, you can iterate at the speed of thought, transforming complex architectural plans into functional, production-ready code in minutes.
content.intro:
You stare at the blank terminal, the weight of a thousand configuration files looming. You want to build, but you are drowning in boilerplate, dependency hell, and the paralyzing fear of starting wrong. Every hour spent configuring is an hour stolen from your vision.

But the best engineers don't start from scratch—they start with leverage. The Antigravity template is your shortcut through the chaos. It is designed to strip away the noise so you can focus on the signal: the product that will define your career.

steps.title: Initialize with Antigravity
steps.description: Scaffold your environment using the standardized Antigravity template to ensure best-practice architecture from the first commit.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new production-ready SaaS starter project with Next.js, Tailwind, and Supabase integration.

steps.title: Configure Claude Code Environment
steps.description: Link your codebase to Claude Code to enable context-aware AI assistance directly within your CLI workflow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the project environment for Claude Code integration, ensuring all source files are indexed for context.

steps.title: Implement Core Auth Logic
steps.description: Use the template's built-in auth hooks to secure your app without writing manual boilerplate.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement user authentication flow using the existing Antigravity auth middleware.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Implement secure sign-up and login using the Antigravity auth provider.'

steps.title: Database Schema Mapping
steps.description: Map your application data model to the database layer provided by the template, ensuring type safety.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate database migration files based on a standard SaaS user and project schema.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Generate Prisma schema for Users, Organizations, and Subscription tables.'

steps.title: Rapid Feature Iteration
steps.description: Build your primary feature set by feeding functional requirements into Claude Code, utilizing the template's modular component library.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a dashboard component that fetches and displays user-specific data from the Supabase backend.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Build a responsive dashboard component using Antigravity UI primitives.'

pro_tips: Always use 'context-only' mode in Claude Code when debugging to prevent the AI from hallucinating external dependencies.
Leverage Antigravity's built-in 'mock-data' flag to test UI components before connecting your real database.
Keep your prompt engineering focused on 'Architectural Constraints' rather than 'Code Syntax' to let the AI handle the boilerplate.
Use Claude Code's 'review' feature on every pull request to catch common security vulnerabilities early.
Modularize your feature requests to the AI—one component per prompt yields 3x higher code quality than asking for an entire module.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is functional, deploy to Vercel using the Antigravity CLI's built-in deployment script and begin gathering user feedback.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools, the template, and the roadmap. The only thing missing is your first commit. Don't wait for perfection—build for impact. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
